# Tests currently expected to pass under tests/tls on mri.
# CI fails if any of these stops passing (regression).
# Empty: lib/mri/neo4j/driver/bolt/connection.rb uses a plain TCP
# socket; TLS support requires wrapping in OpenSSL::SSL::SSLSocket
# and is not implemented yet. Add lines as MRI TLS lands.

test_driver_is_encrypted (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestSecureScheme.test_driver_is_encrypted)
test_driver_is_encrypted (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustCustomCertsConfig.test_driver_is_encrypted)
test_driver_is_encrypted (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustSystemCertsConfig.test_driver_is_encrypted)
test_driver_is_encrypted (tests.tls.test_self_signed_scheme.TestSelfSignedScheme.test_driver_is_encrypted)
test_driver_is_encrypted (tests.tls.test_self_signed_scheme.TestTrustAllCertsConfig.test_driver_is_encrypted)
test_driver_is_not_encrypted (tests.tls.test_unsecure_scheme.TestUnsecureScheme.test_driver_is_not_encrypted)
test_trusted_ca_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustCustomCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_correct_hostname)
test_trusted_ca_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustSystemCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_correct_hostname)
test_trusted_ca_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_self_signed_scheme.TestTrustAllCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_correct_hostname)
test_trusted_ca_expired_server_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustCustomCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_expired_server_correct_hostname)
test_trusted_ca_expired_server_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustSystemCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_expired_server_correct_hostname)
test_trusted_ca_expired_server_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_self_signed_scheme.TestTrustAllCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_expired_server_correct_hostname)
test_trusted_ca_wrong_hostname (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustCustomCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_wrong_hostname)
test_trusted_ca_wrong_hostname (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustSystemCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_wrong_hostname)
test_trusted_ca_wrong_hostname (tests.tls.test_self_signed_scheme.TestTrustAllCertsConfig.test_trusted_ca_wrong_hostname)
test_unencrypted (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustCustomCertsConfig.test_unencrypted)
test_unencrypted (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustSystemCertsConfig.test_unencrypted)
test_unencrypted (tests.tls.test_self_signed_scheme.TestTrustAllCertsConfig.test_unencrypted)
test_untrusted_ca_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustCustomCertsConfig.test_untrusted_ca_correct_hostname)
test_untrusted_ca_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_secure_scheme.TestTrustSystemCertsConfig.test_untrusted_ca_correct_hostname)
test_untrusted_ca_correct_hostname (tests.tls.test_self_signed_scheme.TestTrustAllCertsConfig.test_untrusted_ca_correct_hostname)
test_untrusted_ca_wrong_hostname (tests.tls.test_self_signed_scheme.TestTrustAllCertsConfig.test_untrusted_ca_wrong_hostname)
